name: polish
description: Personal collection of curated, self-made agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Curated personal skills for agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Polish is a personal collection of curated, self-made agent skills. It includes prompt-polish for rewriting rough questions into stronger bilingual LLM prompts, and file-singlify for directory-first duplicate detection and read-only single-copy planning.
defaultPrompt: Use prompt-polish to rewrite this prompt: ...
Rewrite this question for a better LLM answer.
